title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.455 - Injunctions, venue
text:
197.455.  Injunctions, venue. — The department may file an action in the circuit court for the county in which any home health agency alleged to be violating the provisions of sections 197.400 to 197.475 resides or may be found for an injunction to restrain the home health agency from continuing the violation.
(L. 1983 H.B. 51 § 11)
